attr.title: Dungeon Antiqua 2
attr.desc:
Dungeon Antiqua 2 is a 2D dungeon hack-and-slash RPG featuring SNES-style pixel art and sound.
A retro-flavored adventure awaits you, blending strategic exploration with a highly flexible character building system.
attr.desc_md:
**Dungeon Antiqua 2** is a **2D dungeon hack-and-slash RPG ** featuring SNES-style pixel art and sound.
A retro-flavored adventure awaits you, blending strategic exploration with a highly flexible character building system.
attr.inst: Buy the game on https://store.steampowered.com/app/4005090/Dungeon_Antiqua_2/ , install it and copy dungeon-antiqua2.pyxapp in the dungeonantiqua2/gamedata directory.
attr.inst_md: Buy the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4005090/Dungeon_Antiqua_2/), install it and copy `dungeon-antiqua2.pyxapp` in the `dungeonantiqua2/gamedata` directory.
